findings.description: The source's h2 section '使用例' contains >= 2000 characters and includes 2 h3-level subsections ('1行に複数のUI部品を並べる場合' and '列によって異なる行数を定義する場合'), but the knowledge file maps all content to a single section s1 without splitting. Per V3 rules, large h2 sections with existing h3 subsections should be split into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST source has h2 '使用例' (dashes underline) containing two h3 sections with equals underlines: '1行に複数のUI部品を並べる場合' and '列によって異なる行数を定義する場合', each with full code examples exceeding 500 chars individually.
